subject: Unusual Purchase Activity on Your Card
body:
Hi {{participant_fname}} {{participant_lname}},

We noticed a purchase on your Bank of America card that's outside your typical spending pattern:

Merchant: Home Depot
Location: Denver, CO
Amount: $342.17
Time: 3:47 AM EST

If this was you, no action is needed. If you don't recognize this charge, reply YES or NO to this alert, or call the number on the back of your card.

Bank of America Fraud Prevention
